question: Is Pluto classified as a planet?

sources.title: Pluto's Reclassification
sources.text: In 2006, the International Astronomical Union reclassified Pluto as a dwarf planet, removing it from the list of the solar system's eight planets.

mock.claim: Pluto is the ninth planet of the solar system.
mock.output: Pluto is the ninth planet of the solar system [S1].

expected: Pluto was reclassified as a dwarf planet in 2006; the solar system has eight planets, as the cited source states.
why: The cited source states the opposite of the claim — Pluto was reclassified as a dwarf planet, leaving eight planets, not nine.
